title: British Politician Ann Widdecombe Was Murdered with a Hammer, Prosecutors Say
summary_full: The politician, Ann Widdecombe, was eating lunch at home when a man walked in and asked whether she had bank cards, security footage showed.
summary_public: The politician, Ann Widdecombe, was eating lunch at home when a man walked in and asked whether she had bank cards, security footage showed.
